query:
UPDATE products SET imageUrl = CASE 
  WHEN id = 1 THEN 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663346956907/MrMlciaIpWPTCAnd.jpg'
  WHEN id = 2 THEN 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663346956907/DrUCUkSHOeqSsCZH.jpg'
  WHEN id = 3 THEN 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663346956907/jEQLrLKFBjYduUCG.png'
  WHEN id = 4 THEN 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663346956907/NrojTyrlevQgsIvJ.jpg'
END WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 4);
